title: cirrus logcollector: update package list
body:
aardvark-dns, netavark and passt are installed on both debian and fedora. cri-o-runc is not installed anymore and it just uses the normal runc package on debian. This makes sure we correctly log all the package versions on debian as well.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM but I want to see the final results before merging. I've restarted the flakes (#18484)

```
Kernel:  6.6.13-cloud-amd64
Cgroups:  tmpfs
dpkg-query: no packages found matching containers-common
aardvark-dns-1.4.0-5-amd64
buildah-1.33.5+ds1-4-amd64
conmon-2.1.6+ds1-1-amd64
containernetworking-plugins-1.1.1+ds1-3+b9-amd64
criu-3.17.1-3-amd64
crun-1.14-1-amd64
golang-2:1.21~2-amd64
libseccomp2-2.5.5-1-amd64
netavark-1.4.0-4-amd64
passt-0.0~git20231230.f091893-1-amd64
podman-4.9.2+ds1-2-amd64
runc-1.1.12+ds1-1-amd64
skopeo-1.13.3+ds1-2-amd64
slirp4netns-1.2.1-1-amd64
```

Looks we need to to use `golang-github-containers-common` on debian as well for the config files?
Do you want me to add this here as well or in a follow up?
Good catch. Moderate preference for adding it here.

Thanks. LGTM but why the `containers-image`? (Just curious).

In a future iteration I think it's safe to remove `containernetworking-plugins`, and it would be really nice to add `systemd`. Absolutely no need to do so now.

I'm going to wait for CI to finish. When it does, I will run my log-downloader and will look at every individual log before signing off.

> LGTM but why the `containers-image`? (Just curious).

Because debian ships registries.conf in it, if we want to know what version common is for config files than we should also care about the other ones. On fedora everything is part of common so we do not have this there.

Thank you for your patience. I've downloaded all task logs; viewed package list on `Build-*`; and (scripted) diff of each arch log against its `Build-x`. All looks like what I expect.

/lgtm
